firstPage.title: Learn Tajik language for free!
firstPage.intro: Ready to start learning Tajik the fun and easy way? Take your first lesson and unlock the world of Tajik culture!

features.personalizedLearningDesc: Combining the best of AI and language science, lessons are tailored to help you learn at just the right level and pace.

about.title: What is TajikClub?
about.desc: TajikClub is the most effective way to learn the Tajik language. It is web-based and highly interactive. TajikClub is (and will always be) free for both individuals and schools.

howItWorks.title: How Does it Work?
howItWorks.desc: Keep practicing each lesson until you master all words and phrases. It really doesn’t take much – just a few minutes a day for one to two weeks and you will be confident in Tajik!

reasonsPage.title: Why Learn Tajik?
reasonsPage.subtitle: All the reasons to start learning Tajik with us right now:

items.title: It’s a game.
items.desc: Learn Tajik in an engaging and interactive way, with games and challenges.

items.title: Proper pronunciation guide.
items.desc: We will show you the correct pronunciation for every word as you learn.

items.title: Levels, Badges and Stars.
items.desc: Motivating achievements to help you keep progressing and build memory for words.

items.title: Accessibility.
items.desc: TajikClub is designed for everyone, including learners with special needs.

items.title: Interactive experience.
items.desc: Videos, games, quizzes, and fun exercises make learning enjoyable.

items.title: Voice over.
items.desc: Every word is read aloud to improve your listening and speaking skills.

items.title: Performance Tracking.
items.desc: Review your past lessons and see how much you have improved.

items.title: 100% Online.
items.desc: All you need is a keyboard, a device, and a web browser.
